basics.name: Evenson Auguste
basics.summary: Actuarial analyst (P&C) based in Montréal. I develop actuarial and mathematical tools and write about actuarial science, quantitative finance, and pure and applied mathematics.

work.name: Optimum General Insurance
work.summary: Development and improvement of actuarial pricing tools for commercial lines. Data analysis, statistical modeling, and automation using Python, VBA, R and SQL.

work.name: Optimum General Insurance
work.summary: Development of pricing models for automobile and property insurance. Portfolio analysis and automation of actuarial workflows.

work.name: Optimum Reinsurance
work.summary: Development of a RShiny application for actuarial data visualization and exploratory machine learning analyses.

work.name: Observatoire de la Francophonie Économique
work.summary: Development of a data platform for economic research using RShiny and data visualization tools.

work.name: Université de Montréal
work.summary: Teaching assistant for undergraduate courses in statistics and mathematics. Assisted students with R, SAS and statistical modeling.

volunteer.summary: Volunteer role supporting the financial management of the association.

volunteer.organization: L’Axiomatique – Mathematics and Statistics Student Journal
volunteer.summary: Author of a monthly column on actuarial science, finance, and risk.

education.area: Software Engineering – Artificial Intelligence and Data Science

portfolio.name: OFE Data Platform
portfolio.description: Development of an economic data platform using RShiny.

portfolio.name: Personal Research Blog
portfolio.description: Personal website publishing articles on actuarial science, quantitative finance and mathematics.
